title: The Broken Script - Quieter Jumpscares
description: Makes certain sounds in The Broken Script quieter.
body:
This resource pack will become obsolete once 2.0 is released, as 2.0 will introduce a volume setting!

_**Free to use on modpacks, no credit needed**_

**If you are using Version 1.9.4 of The Broken Script or older, PLEASE USE VERSION 1.1 OF THIS RESOURCE PACK.**

This replaces some of the sounds in Wendigodrip's mod, ["The Broken Script"](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script). Many of the scare sounds in TBS are extremely loud to the point of unpleasantness, so I've decided to create this resource pack so that they will play at a more acceptable and hopefully less startling volume. **This mod does not replace or add any textures.**
